title: elytrigia geniculata
intro: Elytrigia geniculata, also known as crested wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its hairy stems and clusters of small yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Elytrigia geniculata include its ability to boost the immune system, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Elytrigia geniculata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to make capsules and tablets.
